title: Palo Alto Networks: Too Pricey For An Investment
text: Palo Alto is a leading provider of cybersecurity solutions. The company's value proposition is designed to detect and prevent both known and unknown threats. Although I acknowledge strong secular growth tailwinds, at FWD x5.9 EV/Sales, PANW stock is trading too expensive to warrant an investment, in my opinion.

title: Palo Alto Networks: A Cybersecurity Leader With Strong Growth Potential
text: The combination of strong financials, positive industry trends, and a strong competitive position make Palo Alto an attractive investment. The global cybersecurity market is expected to grow from $150 billion in 2021 into an eventual market of around $1.5 trillion.
